name: Italian Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the rump roast with salt and pepper.
2. Place the roast on a rack in a 325°F (160°C) oven and cook for 40 minutes per pound or until desired doneness is reached.
3. In a large pan, add the pan drippings and remaining ingredients. Simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Add sliced beef to the sauce and marinate for at least 5 hours, preferably overnight.
5. When ready to serve, bring the mixture to a simmer on top of the stove. Do not boil.
6. Serve on Italian bread or rolls.
